subject: Add de10-nano DT.
author: Sorgelig

upstream.vanilla_quote: ARM: dts: socfpga: Add basic support for Terrasic's de10-nano (2025-02-03, v6.14). Defines model, compatible, chosen/stdout-path, memory@0 (1GiB), and FPGA overlay placeholder (soc/fpga section). Minimal configuration: enabled gpio0/1/2, i2c0 with adxl345, mmc0, uart0. gmac1 configured with rgmii-id phy-mode and 5 skew properties.

provenance_doc_ref: docs/patch-provenance.md §3.1 (Class A), line listing commits aa8afe109 + 12 follow-ups as 'carry — landed (P1.7)'

impact.effect_if_absent: If dropped, MiSTer-specific device tree features are lost: Ethernet alias for MAC injection, early printk, 3.3V regulators, LED definitions (hps_led0 interface expected by Main_MiSTer), complete Ethernet skew tuning (different from vanilla's rgmii-id defaults), USB1 host mode, additional I2C/SPI configuration. Vanilla's minimal de10nano.dts provides basic boot but insufficient for MiSTer platform support.

userspace_coupling.interface: /sys/class/leds/hps_led0/brightness_hw_changed (Main_MiSTer polls this for SD activity indication)
userspace_coupling.main_mister_ref: Main_MiSTer/brightness.cpp uses /dev/spidev1.0 (spi1 device); video.cpp probes HDMI transmitter at 0x39 on /dev/i2c-0..2 (i2c adapter count constraint)

forward_port.conflicts: None. Vanilla 6.18.38 has basic de10nano.dts at intel/socfpga/socfpga_cyclone5_de10nano.dts. Fork's enhancements (aa8afe1 + follow-ups) were re-authored into patch 0004, applied atop vanilla's file. Path changed from flat arch/arm/boot/dts/ to vendor-subdirectory structure between 5.15 (fork) and 6.18 (vanilla).

superseded_by: 0004-dts-de10nano-MiSTer.patch (which re-implements this commit's enhancements plus 12 follow-ups on top of vanilla 144616a80889)

license_provenance: Altera Corporation (C) 2015 copyright header; GPL v2 license text (inline)
notes: Original fork commit (Aug 2021) predates vanilla's de10nano support (v6.14, Feb 2025). The file aa8afe1 created is MUCH more comprehensive than vanilla's minimal version: includes aliases/ethernet0 (load-bearing for U-Boot MAC injection), regulator_3_3v, leds/hps_led0 (ABI requirement for Main_MiSTer SD-activity LED), complete gmac1 skew tuning (12 values vs. vanilla's 5, phy-mode rgmii vs. vanilla's rgmii-id), usb1 host-mode, additional i2c/spi configuration. Vanilla's version (144616a80889) provides only basic boot support and explicitly includes an FPGA device-tree-overlay placeholder (soc/fpga section) that aa8afe1 does not have. NOT upstream: aa8afe1's enhancements are fork-specific MiSTer platform requirements. Disposition 'carried' because vanilla's equivalent is insufficient; this commit (plus 12 follow-ups) is evolved into patch 0004 for 6.18 forward-port. Failure mode 'silent': dropping this without compensation leaves the board bootable but non-functional for MiSTer use (missing regulators, LEDs, USB, proper Ethernet skew, MAC address setup).
